crime.value: Infant substitution/kidnapping conspiracy to steal inheritance and title
crime.quote: Louise Goillard was installed in the chateau... The plots of the marquis and Madame de Bouille thus throve

victim.value: The Countess de Saint-Geran and her newborn heir, targeted for their wealth and noble inheritance
victim.quote: The countess, who played the part of the true mother in the Bible, had the case so much to heart

closed_world.value: The chateau and its household staff during the countess's confinement and childbirth
closed_world.quote: Louise Goillard was installed in the chateau... At the cries of a footman all the household was astir

culprit_and_motive.value: The marquis and Madame de Bouille conspiring with midwife Louise Goillard to steal the inheritance
culprit_and_motive.quote: The plots of the marquis and Madame de Bouille thus throve with most baneful success

resolution.value: Legal proceedings result in judgment recognizing the true heir and condemning conspirators
resolution.quote: la Pigoreau... is condemned to be hung and strangled at a gallows erected in the Place de Greve

investigator.value: Legal system and courts investigating the inheritance dispute through formal proceedings
investigator.quote: Possibly a more obstinate legal contest was never waged, on both sides

suspect_architecture.value: Multiple conspirators with clear hierarchical roles: Marquis de Saint-Maixent (mastermind with inheritance motive), Madame de Bouille (accomplice with shared interest), Louise Goillard/la Pigoreau (hired operative for child substitution), plus various servants and accomplices differentiated by level of involvement and culpability
suspect_architecture.quote: The plots of the marquis and Madame de Bouille thus throve with most baneful success

red_herring.value: The accidental fall of the countess catching her foot in carpet, presented as potential disaster that could prevent the crime, but actually serving as distraction from the deliberate child substitution plot
red_herring.quote: an accident happened which threatened to nullify them, and, by causing a great disaster, to prevent a crime

clue_fairness.value: Legal documentation and court records explicitly presented to reader, including detailed judgment with dates, names, and legal findings that reveal the true parentage and inheritance rights
clue_fairness.quote: Claude Alexandre de Guiche is declared to be the lawful son of Claude de la Guiche and Suzanne de Longaunay

social_world.value: French aristocratic hierarchy with inheritance laws, noble titles, and property rights creating clear power structures where legitimacy of birth determines wealth and status, with servants dependent on noble patrons
social_world.quote: in possession and enjoyment of the name and arms of the house of Guiche, and of all the goods left by Claude

reveal_mechanic.value: Legal proceeding with formal court judgment that definitively establishes true parentage and inheritance rights through judicial process, condemning the perpetrator to death by hanging
reveal_mechanic.quote: she, arraigned and convicted of the offences imputed to her, is condemned to be hung and strangled

media_and_audience.value: Village gossip and public curiosity about the prisoner's importance, with local speculation about the young nobleman's crime and status creating public narrative around the case
media_and_audience.quote: No, more doubt could be entertained that he was a prisoner of importance, and all kinds of conjectures were made

_meta.title: ebook alexandre dumas pere the countess of saint geran
